endpoints.name: Get historical prices for requested currency pairs
endpoints.description:
Historical OHLC data for the specified period and interval size

The combination of the interval parameter and start and end dates can result in results
being truncated to conform to result size limits. See comments on interval parameter for details on valid interval values.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{NFUSIONSOLUTIONS_API_KEY}} with your NFUSIONSOLUTIONS API KEY.

endpoints.name: Get list of currency pairs supported by the history endpoint
endpoints.description:
Only the currency pairs in the direction noted can be used with the history endpoint.
For example: USD/CAD is not the same as CAD/USD
endpoints.notes: Replace {{NFUSIONSOLUTIONS_API_KEY}} with your NFUSIONSOLUTIONS API KEY.

endpoints.name: Get latest mid rate for requested currency pairs
endpoints.notes: Replace {{NFUSIONSOLUTIONS_API_KEY}} with your NFUSIONSOLUTIONS API KEY.

endpoints.name: Get list of currencies supported by the rate endpoint
endpoints.description:
Any of the currencies in this list can be paired with any other currency in this list when supplied to the Rate endpoint.
For example: USD/CAD,CAD/USD,USD/EUR,EUR/CAD
endpoints.notes: Replace {{NFUSIONSOLUTIONS_API_KEY}} with your NFUSIONSOLUTIONS API KEY.

endpoints.name: Get latest Summary for requested currency pairs
endpoints.description: Current and daily summary information combined into a single quote
endpoints.notes: Replace {{NFUSIONSOLUTIONS_API_KEY}} with your NFUSIONSOLUTIONS API KEY.

endpoints.name: Get list of currency pairs supported by the Summary endpoint
endpoints.description:
Only the currency pairs in the direction noted can be used with the Summary endpoint.
For example: USD/CAD is not the same as CAD/USD
endpoints.notes: Replace {{NFUSIONSOLUTIONS_API_KEY}} with your NFUSIONSOLUTIONS API KEY.

endpoints.name: Get historical benchmark prices for requested metals
endpoints.description:
Historical OHLC data for the specified period and interval size

The combination of the interval parameter and start and end dates can result in results
being truncated to conform to result size limits. See comments on interval parameter for details on valid interval values.

The historicalfx flag is used to determine whether to apply today's fx rates to a historical period, or to apply the historical rates from that same time frame.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{NFUSIONSOLUTIONS_API_KEY}} with your NFUSIONSOLUTIONS API KEY.

endpoints.name: Get latest Benchmark prices for requested metals
endpoints.notes: Replace {{NFUSIONSOLUTIONS_API_KEY}} with your NFUSIONSOLUTIONS API KEY.

endpoints.name: Get list of symbols supported by the benchmark endpoints
endpoints.description: Get list of symbols supported by the benchmark endpoints
endpoints.notes: Replace {{NFUSIONSOLUTIONS_API_KEY}} with your NFUSIONSOLUTIONS API KEY.

endpoints.name: Get historical Spot prices for requested metals
endpoints.description:
Historical OHLC data for the specified period and interval size

The combination of the interval parameter and start and end dates can result in results
being truncated to conform to result size limits. See comments on interval parameter for details on valid interval values.

The historicalfx flag is used to determine whether to apply today's fx rates to a historical period, or to apply the historical rates from that same time frame.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{NFUSIONSOLUTIONS_API_KEY}} with your NFUSIONSOLUTIONS API KEY.

endpoints.name: Get Historical Performance for requested metals
endpoints.notes: Replace {{NFUSIONSOLUTIONS_API_KEY}} with your NFUSIONSOLUTIONS API KEY.

endpoints.name: Get Historical Annual Performance for requested metals
endpoints.notes: Replace {{NFUSIONSOLUTIONS_API_KEY}} with your NFUSIONSOLUTIONS API KEY.

The combination of the interval parameter and start and end dates can result in results
being truncated to conform to result size limits. See comments on interval parameter for details on valid interval values.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{NFUSIONSOLUTIONS_API_KEY}} with your NFUSIONSOLUTIONS API KEY.

endpoints.name: Get latest Spot Summary for requested metal ratios
endpoints.description: Ratios between prices of two metals
endpoints.notes: Replace {{NFUSIONSOLUTIONS_API_KEY}} with your NFUSIONSOLUTIONS API KEY.

endpoints.name: Get latest Spot Summary for requested metals

endpoints.notes: Replace {{NFUSIONSOLUTIONS_API_KEY}} with your NFUSIONSOLUTIONS API KEY.

endpoints.name: Get list of symbols supported by the spot endpoints

endpoints.notes: Replace {{NFUSIONSOLUTIONS_API_KEY}} with your NFUSIONSOLUTIONS API KEY.

endpoints.name: Get list of currencies supported by metals endpoints for currency conversion
endpoints.description: Get list of currencies supported by metals endpoints for currency conversion
endpoints.notes: Replace {{NFUSIONSOLUTIONS_API_KEY}} with your NFUSIONSOLUTIONS API KEY.
